# Copilot Instructions

This is a GitHub profile README repository that displays a personal profile page at github.com/chanisagithub.

## Repository Purpose

The README.md file is the sole content—it renders as the GitHub profile page. Changes to README.md directly affect the public profile appearance.

## GitHub Actions Workflows

Two automated workflows run in this repository:

- **snake.yml** - Generates contribution graph snake animations (runs daily and on push to main/master). Uses `Platane/snk` to create SVGs published to an `output` branch.
- **waka-readme.yml** - Updates WakaTime coding stats in the README (runs daily). Requires `WAKATIME_API_KEY` secret.

## Editing Guidelines

When modifying README.md:
- Preserve the `<!--START_SECTION:waka-->` / `<!--END_SECTION:waka-->` comment markers—the WakaTime action writes stats between them
- Badge URLs use shields.io and other third-party services; verify URLs still work after changes
- The snake SVG references files from the `output` branch generated by the snake workflow
